note: Plan Task N maps to native task id N+7 (Task 0 = native #7 ... Task 15 = native #22). Full task descriptions live in the native task list; this file is the resume index.

tasks.subject: Task 0: Solution scaffolding & code-style conventions
tasks.description: Create 5 projects, .editorconfig (ban var), CLAUDE.md (declare-at-top), wire references, build green. See plan Task 0.

tasks.subject: Task 1: CryptoApi — result types & SCEP enums
tasks.description: ScepClientResult, ScepResult<T>, CodecOptions, ConformanceNote, MessageType/PkiStatus/FailInfo (RFC 8894 values). See plan Task 1.

tasks.subject: Task 2: CryptoApi — algorithm registry & KeySpec
tasks.description: AlgorithmKind, Algorithms (OID<->name, kind-tagged), KeySpec.Parse. See plan Task 2.

tasks.subject: Task 3: CryptoApi — crypto contract & domain objects
tasks.description: IScepKey, CryptoCapabilities, FaultDirectives, Pkcs10, PkiMessage (always-valid, delegating), IScepCrypto + PQ-tier paper validation. See plan Task 3.

tasks.subject: Task 4: BC provider — key generation & capabilities
tasks.description: BcKey, BcAlgorithms, BouncyCastleScepCrypto.GenerateKey + Capabilities. See plan Task 4.

tasks.subject: Task 5: BC provider — CSR encode
tasks.description: BcCsrBuilder: subject, key, challenge attr, SAN/UPN/SID/EKU/template/arbitrary ext; wire EncodeCsr. See plan Task 5.

tasks.subject: Task 6: BC provider — pkiMessage encode (PKCSReq) & GetCACert parse
tasks.description: ScepAttributes, BcSelfSigned, BcPkiMessage.EncodePkcsReq (SignedData over EnvelopedData), ParseCaCertificates; TestCa fixture. See plan Task 6.

tasks.subject: Task 7: BC provider — pkiMessage decode (CertRep)
tasks.description: BcPkiMessage.Decode: signature verify (lenient), status/failInfo/nonces, decrypt, issued certs; wire DecodePkiMessage. See plan Task 7.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Core — provider loading (ScepCrypto.Load + ALC)
tasks.description: ProviderLoadContext (share CryptoApi), ScepCrypto.Load with built-in fallback. See plan Task 8.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Core — Trace, ServerConfig & HTTP transport
tasks.description: ScepTraceEvent, ServerConfig, ScepHttpTransport (sync Send + async SendAsync; GET base64, POST pki). See plan Task 9.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Core — GetCACaps parsing (ScepCapabilities)
tasks.description: ScepCapabilities.Parse over the keyword list. See plan Task 10.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Core — ScepClient facade (read ops + enroll/poll)
tasks.description: ScepClient: Create, Crypto, Trace, GetCaCaps/GetCaCert/GetNextCaCert/Enroll (sync+async), EnrollRequest/EnrollOutcome. See plan Task 11.

tasks.subject: Task 12: Core — storage (breadcrumb, redaction, registry, cert store, use-records)
tasks.description: DataRoot (breadcrumb), Redaction (sha256), ClientConfig, ServerRegistry, CertStore (+ ExportPrivateKeyPkcs8), UseRecordLog. See plan Task 12.

tasks.subject: Task 13: Core — high-level GetNewCertificate orchestration
tasks.description: GetNewCertificate[/Async]: GetCACert -> Enroll -> store cert/metadata + timed use-record. See plan Task 13.

tasks.subject: Task 14: Tests — FakeScepServer fixture & end-to-end enrollment
tasks.description: USER-GATE. FakeScepServer (loopback SCEP CA) + TestCa.IssueCertRep + EndToEndTests (async+sync). See plan Task 14.

tasks.subject: Task 15: CLI — command router, commands & console trace
tasks.description: Program, CommandRouter (global flags + nouns), ConsoleTrace; servers/getcacaps/getcacert/get/certs/config; full build+test green. See plan Task 15.
